title: Standard Galactic Alphabet font
description: enchanting table language but it's the entire game
body:
Hello!! I'm back with another silly font texture pack - now turning everything to the **Standard Galactic Alphabet**, or better known in-game as the **Enchanting Table Language**! This pack also includes a TNT retexture to follow the language and bring even more cohesivity to your SGA experience.

_**Warning:**_ Unless you are fluent in this language, make sure you know how to get back to the resource pack menu without reading is as otherwise you're a bit screwed lol

idk why, but i genuinely find this a bit interesting, so i hope you do too!
